item.title: Ciklopea Achieves ISO 13485 Certification
item.description: Ciklopea, a distinguished European provider of translation and localization services, has just received a globally recognised quality standard for the medical device industry - ISO 13485 certification. The company has also passed expert audits for ISO 9001, ISO 17100, and ISO 18587. Continue Reading

item.title: GALA Annual Survey 2026 Findings
item.description: Each year, GALA’s Annual Survey offers a candid look at how our community experiences the association. We find out what’s working well and where we must improve, and we gauge the community’s sentiments about the association and the value we create. Continue Reading

item.title: Acolad is seeking a Head of Business Development Manager
item.description: The Head of Sales will be responsible for driving revenue growth, developing and executing sales strategies, and leading a team of salespeople. Join the Acolad team today! Continue Reading

item.title: Acolad is seeking a Pre-Sales Manager for Interpreting Solutions
item.description: To lead and manage pre-sales activities for strategic interpreting opportunities by shaping tailored solutions and services, building pricing models, conducting profit and loss (P&L) analyses, and creating compelling content for technical proposals. Join the Acolad team. Continue Reading

item.title: Acolad is seeking a Senior Account Manager
item.description: The role is based in Belgium and will cover the Belgian market and international accounts managed by Acolad’s Belgian division. Join the Acolad team. Continue Reading

item.title: Phrase Launches Platform Innovations to Take AI from Playground to Production
item.description: Phrase, a global leader in AI-led language technology, today announced a major platform update designed to help enterprises embed generative AI across global content operations. Continue Reading

item.title: XTM introduces multilingual software video generation for enterprise teams
item.description: XTM International, a leading AI globalisation platform, has announced the launch of XTM Software Recorder, a major new capability that enables multilingual software video generation at scale. Continue Reading

item.title: Rheinschrift Rebrands as Next-Generation Boutique Consulting Partner
item.description: The company unveils new logo, website, refreshed brand and visual identity to reflect its evolution. Continue Reading

item.title: Call for Presentations for the Translating and the Computer Conference
item.description: AsLing invites submissions for the 47th edition of the Translating and the Computer Conference (TC47), to be held from 8 to 10 December 2026 in Luxembourg. Continue Reading

item.title: Creative Words and Blackbird Partner to Automate Enterprise Content Operations
item.description: Creative Words, a leader in localization and multilingual content solutions, today announced a strategic partnership with Blackbird.io, the content orchestration and governance platform to enable enterprise clients to deploy automated multilingual workflows. Continue Reading

item.title: Semmelweis Medical Linguistics Conference 2026 – Last Call for Papers
item.description: SMLC 2026 will take place on 5–6 June 2026 in Budapest, Hungary, in a hybrid format. This conference series aims to bring together researchers, educators, and professionals working in the field of healthcare communications and linguistics. Submit by 30 March. Continue Reading

item.title: An Open Letter to the Talents Who Make Our Industry Human
item.description: Today, we’re launching Talent Spotlight by Creative Words — a platform designed to match skilled professionals who are available for work, especially those impacted by layoffs, with companies looking for in-house talent in our ever-expanding localization ecosystem. Continue Reading
